chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4945 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.22622/2023. 2. For haring of main case. 02.10.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG along with Mr. Faraz Qureshi, SO Estate and Ghulam Nabi Memon Sub Engineer Estate. ------------- None present for the petitioner without intimation despite this being a date fixed matter. It is noted that petitioner has interim order operating in her favour in the last two years. Diary sheet reveals that petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, despite this being a date by Court matter, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. However, petitioner is directed to vacate concerned premises within thirty days of the date of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to Secretary SGA&CD, Government of Sindh for compliance. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
